case_title: VERNON PAUL PIUMARTA VS. CHESTNUT STREET COFFEE ROASTERY et al

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIUMARTA, VERNON PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CHESTNUT STREET COFFEE ROASTERY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-23-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-22-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-08-2013
ARBITRATOR MARK RICHARD CARBONE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-05-2013 THROUGH JUL-04-2013.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIUMARTA, VERNON PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHESTNUT STREET COFFEE ROASTERY $127,880.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $127,880.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIUMARTA, VERNON PAUL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT CHESTNUT STREET COFFEE ROASTERY
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MICHAEL FRANCIS HARDIMAN.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BRIGGS, RONALD L SUBSTITUTED FOR BARDACOS, JACQUETTA AS ATTORNEY FOR PIUMARTA, VERNON PAUL
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO SEP-13-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIUMARTA, VERNON PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CHESTNUT STREET COFFEE ROASTERY
